---
title: "DFT to study the structural, optoelectronic and mechanical properties of CuNiPd and Cu2PPd2 alloys"
date: 2025-08-01
author:
  - name: Pereira Dos Santos, Caroline
  - name: Prado Silva, Carlos Henrique
  - name: Silva Santos, Marcelo Franklin Da
  - name: Pereira De Novais, Érico Raimundo
  - name: Nascimento Souza, Divanizia Do
  - name: Santos Rezende, Marcos Vinicius Dos
  - name: Lima Ferreira Novais, Andréa De
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Journal of Alloys and Compounds"
  volume: 1038
  doi: "10.1016/j.jallcom.2025.182830"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">DFT to study the structural, optoelectronic and mechanical properties of CuNiPd and Cu2PPd2 alloys</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
